name: Mist OS
tagline: Unofficial MistOS 4.5 Velour for pacman with flashbang fix, Nothing Gallery, and separate GMS or Vanilla package choices.
maintenanceNote: Current focus: install reliability, flashbang fix, and banking app compatibility notes
highlights: Includes the flashbang fix and Nothing Gallery out of the box.
Offers both GMS and Vanilla packages for the pacman release.
Keeps Fenrir out by default and drops Blur by default as well.
changelog: Fenrir is not included by default, although the required patches are applied.
Some banking apps still need a keybox to work properly.
If adb sideload fails during installation, cancel it, reconnect the cable, and try again.
During sideload it can pause around 47 percent with a root prompt; choose no if you do not want root and then reboot to system.
